subcodes.first_line: O thou who seekest illumination from the light of guidance! Dense clouds have gathered and enshrouded the horizons of hardened hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استهدی علی نور الهدی قد ثارث غیوم متکاثفه و غشت آفاق القلوب القاسیه
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
